description: Create a statistical summary of the Palmer Penguins dataset located at /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/penguins.csv. Generate a summary table showing the mean and standard deviation of body mass for each penguin species (Adelie, Chinstrap, Gentoo). The output must be a CSV file with columns 'species', 'mean_mass', and 'sd_mass' saved to /home/ga/RProjects/output/species_summary.csv.
